items.title: Defend your base from 67 is live on Roblox
items.summary: The official Roblox listing confirms the experience name, developer, and the core premise: upgrade your gate and turrets, then survive 67 breaking through.

items.title: Core guide demand centers on gate upgrades, turret priority, and wave survival
items.summary: Because the listing gives a very direct defense loop, the most valuable launch pages are a defense planner, upgrade-order tier list, and a clean beginner route.

items.title: Code coverage remains in tracker mode
items.summary: No reliable public redeem-code flow is confirmed yet, so the site keeps the codes page honest instead of copying filler lists.
